text.title: Service Delivery SOP Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (manual_delivery_count, target_operator_seniority, founder_can_articulate_steps) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

branch.question: Founder can articulate steps without 'it depends'?

conclusion.verdict: service not yet productizable; deliver more times first
no stable pattern; deliver more times before codifying

text.example: manual_delivery_count=12 → founder_can_articulate_steps=true → apply SOP authoring (rule input-per-step-named).
